% wkb_exponent_table.tex -- generated by build_wkb_table.py
% Source: sessions/2026-05-01/BOREL-CHANNEL-5X/summary.json
% Channel: log|delta_n| = -A n log n + alpha n - beta log n + gamma + sum h_k/n^k
% Closed-form: alpha = A - 2 log(c_b) + log|c_a|, where c_a, c_b are leading
% coefficients of a_n, b_n; A = 4 for V_quad (degree-2 a/b ratio extra), A=3 otherwise.
\begin{table}[ht]
\centering
\small
\begin{tabular}{lcccccr}
\toprule
Family & $\Delta$ & $A$ & $\alpha_{\mathrm{pred}}=A-2\log c_{b}+\log|c_{a}|$ & $\alpha_{\mathrm{obs}}$ & match digits \\
\midrule
$\mathrm{V_{quad}}$ & $-11$ & $4$ & $4-2\log 3 = 1.80277542266378062$ & $1.8027754226638$ & $13$ \\
QL01 & $-3$ & $3$ & $3 = 3.0$ & $3.0$ & $100$ \\
QL02 & $-4$ & $3$ & $3 + \log 2 = 3.69314718055994531$ & $3.6931471805599$ & $13$ \\
QL06 & $-7$ & $3$ & $3-2\log 2 = 1.61370563888010938$ & $1.6137056388801$ & $14$ \\
QL15 & $-20$ & $3$ & $3-2\log 3 = 0.802775422663780617$ & $0.80277542266378$ & $15$ \\
QL26 & $-28$ & $3$ & $3-2\log 4 + \log 3 = 1.32602356642832845$ & $1.3260235664283$ & $13$ \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\caption{WKB trans-series exponents for the six $\Delta<0$ degree-2 PCFs. $\alpha_{\mathrm{pred}}$ is the closed-form WKB prediction; $\alpha_{\mathrm{obs}}$ is extracted by least-squares fit to $\log|\delta_{n}|$ on $n\in[15,120]$ at $K=12$, $\mathrm{dps}=2200$. Match-digits is the number of leading matching decimal digits. All six families match the closed form to $\geq 13$ digits, locking the leading WKB asymptotics for the publication.}
\label{tab:wkb-exponents}
\end{table}
